s: 3D parallax live wallpaper with gyroscope sensor support
d:
FloatDeck is an Android live wallpaper that uses your device's gyroscope/accelerometer sensors to create a 3D parallax depth effect with floating character portraits.

Features:
• Gyroscope-based 3D parallax effect
• Import and display character portraits as floating cards
• Customizable template layouts
• Lock screen support with smooth transitions
• Inertia-based physics for natural movement
• Completely open source, no trackers, no internet permission
